trmnl_setup.title: TRMNL Setup
trmnl_setup.description:
Before entering the webhook URL, create a plugin on trmnl.com:

1. Go to [**Plugins → Webhook Image**]({trmnl_plugin_url})
2. Give it a name, set **Image Fit Mode** to **Contain**, and click **Save**
3. Copy the **Webhook URL** shown on the plugin page

Select **Submit** when ready to enter the URL.

**Battery level widget:** To display your TRMNL's battery level, install the [**TRMNL**]({trmnl_integration_url}) integration separately, then select its battery sensor in Device Settings. See the [TRMNL guide]({trmnl_docs_url}) for details.

data_description.webhook_url: From trmnl.com: device settings → Private API Plugin → webhook URL
data_description.label: A name for this push target — defaults to the device name if left empty

error.invalid_url: Please enter a valid http or https URL.

locale_settings.title: Locale Settings
locale_settings.description: Override the Home Assistant owner's locale preferences for this display. Leave fields empty to use the defaults.

data_description.locale_language: Language for locale-dependent formatting. Leave empty to use the HA owner's language.
data_description.locale_number_format: How numbers are formatted (decimal and thousands separators). Leave empty to use the HA owner's preference.
data_description.locale_first_weekday: First day of the week for calendar and weather displays. Leave empty to use the HA owner's preference.
data_description.locale_date_format: How dates are formatted. Leave empty to use the HA owner's preference.
data_description.locale_time_format: 12-hour or 24-hour clock. Leave empty to use the HA owner's preference.
